name: Kaori Rami
description:
-A little carried away-

!Non-Canon Ioverse Oc!

Summary: Kaori is having just the most swell of days, she's bought herself new nail polish, new makeup, new brushes, she's invited a friend over to test some nail polishes, and it really is just swell. It's just..she completely loses sight of the fact that she should've stopped at nail polish, and instead is so intent on testing all of her new things! Just..testing them on YOU. without having asked. She May have gotten far too carried away.
